content: Autonomous curiosity-driven agents can leverage streaming experience processing techniques originally designed for Intrinsic Curiosity Module (ICM) training to continuously grow their active memory without catastrophic forgetting. Instead of pre-loading static datasets for offline ICM training, the agent intrinsically curates its own streaming stream of novel, curiosity-triggered experiences to incrementally update both its exploration policy and long-term memory store.
source_topics: Streaming experience processing for ICM training
trigger_topic: Streaming experience processing for ICM training
